dialog.stepLabel: Cultured Exile: "I've already explained what happened, just give me the packa..."

items.speaker: Cultured Exile
items.text: I've already explained what happened, just give me the package.

items.speaker: Cultured Exile
items.text: If you can't, I'll... I'll file a complaint with your manager!

items.speaker: Courier
items.text: Don't worry, Lollo Logistics always takes care of its customers. We'll definitely get back to you within three business days.

items.speaker: Cultured Exile
items.text: Three days!? What if it's broken or lost? Don't you know how serious—

items.speaker: Courier
items.text: Oh, if it's broken or lost, you can get a full refund. Plus, the shipping insurance you have covers it. So really, there's nothing to worry about!

items.speaker: Cultured Exile
items.text: ...If you say so. Come to think of it, Lollo Logistics has never missed a delivery... In that case, I'll come back later.
The Exile stresses the package's importance, and after a member of Lollo Logistics assures them it will be retrieved, he leaves in reluctance.
